'''ân-l-p''' ('''kanalap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pong|pong]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pong|pong]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-l-p
|-
! Lemma
| kanalap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinalap|thinalap]] || [[word:jinalap|jinalap]] || [[word:shinalap|shinalap]] || [[word:kinalap|kinalap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunalap|thuthunalap]] || [[word:jujunalap|jujunalap]] || [[word:shushunalap|shushunalap]] || [[word:kukunalap|kukunalap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunalap|thunalap]] || [[word:junalap|junalap]] || [[word:shunalap|shunalap]] || [[word:kunalap|kunalap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunalap|thunalap]] || [[word:junalap|junalap]] || [[word:shunalap|shunalap]] || [[word:kunalap|kunalap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenalap|thenalap]] || [[word:jenalap|jenalap]] || [[word:shenalap|shenalap]] || [[word:kenalap|kenalap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonalap|thothonalap]] || [[word:jojonalap|jojonalap]] || [[word:shoshonalap|shoshonalap]] || [[word:kokonalap|kokonalap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonalap|thonalap]] || [[word:jonalap|jonalap]] || [[word:shonalap|shonalap]] || [[word:konalap|konalap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonalap|thonalap]] || [[word:jonalap|jonalap]] || [[word:shonalap|shonalap]] || [[word:konalap|konalap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnalap|thĂŠnalap]] || [[word:jĂŠnalap|jĂŠnalap]] || [[word:shĂŠnalap|shĂŠnalap]] || [[word:kĂŠnalap|kĂŠnalap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanalap|thathanalap]] || [[word:jajanalap|jajanalap]] || [[word:shashanalap|shashanalap]] || [[word:kakanalap|kakanalap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanalap|thanalap]] || [[word:janalap|janalap]] || [[word:shanalap|shanalap]] || [[word:kanalap|kanalap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanalap|thanalap]] || [[word:janalap|janalap]] || [[word:shanalap|shanalap]] || [[word:kanalap|kanalap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanalap|shanalap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanalap|goshanalap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanalap|gokishanalap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanalapnĂŒ|shanalapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanalapnknĂŒ|goshanalapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalapnĂŒ|gokishanalapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanalapshĂ«|shanalapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanalapnkshĂ«|goshanalapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanalapshĂ«|gokishanalapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalapro|shanalapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalapnkro|goshanalapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalapro|gokishanalapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalapmu|shanalapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalapnkmu|goshanalapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalapmu|gokishanalapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanalapsher|shanalapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanalapnksher|goshanalapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanalapsher|gokishanalapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanalapng|shanalapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanalapnkng|goshanalapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanalapng|gokishanalapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanalapya|shanalapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanalapnkya|goshanalapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanalapya|gokishanalapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanalapyam|shanalapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanalapnkyam|goshanalapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanalapyam|gokishanalapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalapnĂŒshĂ«|shanalapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanalapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanalapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalapnĂŒro|shanalapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalapnknĂŒro|goshanalapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalapnĂŒro|gokishanalapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalapnĂŒmu|shanalapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalapnknĂŒmu|goshanalapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalapnĂŒmu|gokishanalapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalapshĂ«nĂŒ|shanalapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanalapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanalapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalapshĂ«ro|shanalapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalapnkshĂ«ro|goshanalapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalapshĂ«ro|gokishanalapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalapshĂ«mu|shanalapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalapnkshĂ«mu|goshanalapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalapshĂ«mu|gokishanalapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalapronĂŒ|shanalapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalapnkronĂŒ|goshanalapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalapronĂŒ|gokishanalapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalaproshĂ«|shanalaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalapnkroshĂ«|goshanalapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalaproshĂ«|gokishanalaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalapromu|shanalapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalapnkromu|goshanalapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalapromu|gokishanalapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalapmunĂŒ|shanalapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalapnkmunĂŒ|goshanalapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalapmunĂŒ|gokishanalapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalapmushĂ«|shanalapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalapnkmushĂ«|goshanalapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalapmushĂ«|gokishanalapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalapmuro|shanalapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalapnkmuro|goshanalapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalapmuro|gokishanalapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
